kind.description: optional filter: badge | challenge

duration_overrides.description: optional per-intent duration overrides that supersede the template's step durations (e.g. progress a tempo block 75min→80min across weeks) and drive the materialized session length; at most one per intent; single-sport slots only

duration.description: bounded duration, same shape as a workout-template step duration (e.g. {"kind":"time","seconds":3600} for 60min or {"kind":"distance","meters":10000}); open/lap_button are rejected

multisport_template_id.description: the multisport-template UUID this slot schedules (a triathlon/brick); provide EXACTLY ONE of template_id or multisport_template_id. A multisport slot does not accept target_overrides/duration_overrides

ordinal.description: order of this session within the day (0-based)

target_overrides.description: optional per-intent target overrides that supersede the template's targets (e.g. progress an interval pace across weeks); at most one per intent; single-sport slots only

target.description: effort target, same shape as a workout-template step target (e.g. {"kind":"pace","low_sec_per_km":435,"high_sec_per_km":435} for 7:15/km; for swim use {"kind":"swim_pace","low_sec_per_100m":92,"high_sec_per_100m":96}; for a bike/run cadence drill use {"kind":"cadence","low":88,"high":92})

template_id.description: the single-sport workout-template UUID this slot schedules; provide EXACTLY ONE of template_id or multisport_template_id

time_of_day.description: optional local start time HH:MM or HH:MM:SS

ordinal.description: week number, at least 1, unique within the plan

phase_id.description: optional training-phase UUID for this week

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; derived from the items if omitted

items.description: the consolidated shopping list, 1–200 items, in display order

plan_date.description: optional plan date YYYY-MM-DD this came from (provenance)

quantity_text.description: opaque quantity text, e.g. '3 large' or '500 g' — already merged across recipes by you; the API never parses it

recipe_product_id.description: optional UUID of the recipe product this came from (soft provenance)

threshold_pace_sec_per_km.description: run threshold pace in seconds per km

threshold_swim_pace_sec_per_100m.description: swim threshold pace in seconds per 100m

end_date.description: inclusive season end date YYYY-MM-DD (must be >= start_date)

methodology.description: optional curated Markdown 'why this whole arc' prose the coach reads; distinct from operational notes

race_id.description: optional UUID of the goal race the season peaks for (the A-race); resolves race_name on read

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; derived from args when omitted

name.description: human-readable session name, e.g. 'Olympic Tri Race Sim'

segments.description: ordered segments: at least two sport segments, with optional transition segments between them (e.g. swim, T1, bike, T2, run)

duration.description: for a transition segment only: the changeover end condition (typically kind lap_button)

kind.description: end condition: one of time, distance, lap_button, open

meters.description: required for distance durations; greater than 0

seconds.description: required for time durations; greater than 0

sport.description: segment sport: run | bike | swim | strength | yoga | mobility | other, or transition for a T1/T2 changeover

steps.description: for a sport segment: its ordered step program (same model as a workout template), validated under this segment's sport

count.description: for a repeat group: number of iterations, at least 2

duration.description: for a single step: the end condition

kind.description: end condition: one of time, distance, lap_button, open

meters.description: required for distance durations; greater than 0

seconds.description: required for time durations; greater than 0

intent.description: for a single step: one of warmup, active, interval, recovery, rest, cooldown

note.description: for a single step: optional free-text cue

secondary_target.description: for a single step: optional second simultaneous target, bike templates only; must be a different metric family than target (e.g. primary power_zone + secondary hr_zone or cadence)

high.description: upper bound; must be at least the lower bound

high_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace upper bound, seconds per 100m (swim only)

high_sec_per_km.description: pace upper bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

kind.description: one of none, hr_zone, power_zone, pace, swim_pace, hr_bpm, power_w, cadence, rpe

low.description: lower bound (zones are 1 to 5; hr_bpm, power_w, rpe in their own units; cadence in rpm on bike / spm on run, bike or run only)

low_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace lower bound, seconds per 100m (swim only; e.g. 95 for 1:35/100m)

low_sec_per_km.description: pace lower bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

steps.description: for a repeat group: single steps to repeat (no nested repeats)

seconds.description: required for time durations; greater than 0

end_date.description: inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD (must be >= start_date)

macrocycle_id.description: optional macrocycle (season) UUID this phase belongs to; planning metadata only, does not change adherence

macrocycle_ordinal.description: optional position of this phase in the season's progression (1-based ordering hint)

methodology.description: optional curated Markdown 'why this phase' prose (citations, narrative) the coach reads when grounding advice — distinct from operational notes; surfaced in the /context/training covering phase

target_weekly_hours.description: optional per-period planning target for weekly training hours

target_weekly_tss.description: optional per-period planning target for weekly TSS (the deliberate load ramp); declared intent, not compared to actuals

from.description: inclusive RFC 3339 lower bound on started_at

session_group.description: optional: narrow to the legs of one brick/multisport session (exact-match on the session_group key). The from/to window is still required.

status.description: optional: filter by lifecycle status 'planned' or 'completed'. The from/to window is still required.

to.description: inclusive RFC 3339 upper bound on started_at; max 92 days from 'from'

date.description: the calendar day YYYY-MM-DD (the snapshot identity; re-posting the same date updates in place)

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args
optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args. To log the same drink twice, pass a distinct key.

logged_at.description: when the drink was consumed, RFC 3339 timestamp

quantity_ml.description: volume drunk in millilitres; must be greater than zero

workout_id.description: optional UUID of an existing workout to link this hydration entry to. The link is metadata; workout_fueling_summary aggregates by logged_at time-window matching, not by this tag.

activity_intake_ml.description: fluid taken during activities that day in millilitres (>= 0; a real 0 means sweated but drank nothing)

date.description: the calendar day YYYY-MM-DD (the snapshot identity; re-posting the same date updates in place)

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args

sweat_loss_ml.description: estimated daily sweat loss in millilitres (> 0)

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args

logged_at.description: when the meal was eaten, RFC 3339 timestamp (UTC or with offset)

product_id.description: the product id returned by lookup_product_by_barcode or search_products

quantity_g.description: amount eaten in grams; must be greater than zero

workout_id.description: optional UUID of an existing workout to link this meal to. The link is metadata; workout_fueling_summary aggregates by logged_at time-window matching, not by this tag.

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args. To intentionally log the same item twice, pass a distinct key here.

logged_at.description: when the meal was eaten, RFC 3339 timestamp

name.description: the food item described by the user (e.g. 'banana', 'oat porridge')

nutriments_per_100g.description: your best estimate of the per-100g macros; missing fields stay null

quantity_g.description: amount eaten in grams; must be greater than zero

save_as_product.description: true to also create a reusable product row with these nutriments

workout_id.description: optional UUID of an existing workout to link this meal to

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key. If omitted, a stable key is derived from the (decoded image bytes + metadata) — byte-identical replays return the original meal without a second Claude call.

image_base64.description: image bytes, base64-encoded (JPEG or PNG; HEIC is rejected with 415 in v1)

body_battery_charged.description: body battery charged over the day 0..100

body_battery_drained.description: body battery drained over the day 0..100

date.description: the calendar day YYYY-MM-DD (the snapshot identity; re-posting the same date updates in place)

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args

bone_mass_kg.description: optional smart-scale bone mass in kg (> 0)

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args

logged_at.description: when the measurement was taken, RFC 3339 timestamp

muscle_mass_kg.description: optional smart-scale muscle mass in kg (> 0)

weight_kg.description: body weight in kilograms; must be greater than zero

avg_hr.description: average heart rate in bpm; positive integer

avg_power_w.description: average power in WATTS (positive integer). Nullable.

distance_m.description: session distance in METRES (> 0). Nullable; omit if the source did not measure it.

ended_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp the workout ended; must be after started_at

external_id.description: writer-supplied dedup key, e.g. 'garmin:1234567'. Garmin and other sourced writers SHOULD set this. For agent-driven manual entries, leave it unset.

gi_distress_score.description: GI distress severity, integer 1..5 (1 = no distress, 5 = severe / couldn't continue). Per session — the rehearsal-outcome signal that lets you iterate fueling strategy. Nullable.

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args. Note: writers normally rely on external_id for dedup, not this header.

kcal_burned.description: calories burned during the session; positive number

name.description: optional human-readable label, e.g. 'Morning Z2 ride'

notes.description: free-text notes (e.g. how the fueling went, which product caused issues at minute N)

rpe.description: Borg CR-10 perceived effort, integer 1..10. Per session — logged after the workout. Nullable; omit for non-rehearsal rides (Z1 spins, gym sessions, etc.).

session_group.description: free-text key linking the legs of a brick/multisport session — set the SAME key on every leg (e.g. the Garmin parent activity id) so they can be fetched together. Nullable.

status.description: 'completed' (default) for a session that happened, or 'planned' for a scheduled future session. Planned workouts may be future-dated (up to 1 year); completed ones cannot be more than 24h ahead.

sweat_loss_ml.description: estimated sweat loss in MILLILITRES (> 0). Personalises fluid targets. Nullable.

temperature_c.description: ambient temperature in °C, range -40..60. Heat context for fueling. Nullable.

tss.description: Training Stress Score; the intensity signal. Non-negative.

caffeine_mg.description: optional caffeine amount in milligrams; >= 0. Pass 0 explicitly to signal 'measured, no caffeine' (e.g. a decaf product) — distinct from omitting (which means 'not measured').

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args.

logged_at.description: when the fueling event happened, RFC 3339 timestamp

name.description: product/brand name of the gel, drink, salt tab, or caffeine source. Required — rehearsal data depends on knowing WHAT was taken.

note.description: optional free-text note (rehearsal observations, flavour, GI feel)

quantity_ml.description: optional volume in millilitres (drinks only); must be greater than zero if supplied

workout_id.description: optional UUID of an existing workout to link this entry to. The link is metadata; workout_fueling_summary aggregates by logged_at time-window matching, not by this tag.

barcode.description: the product barcode (EAN/UPC) to look up

refresh.description: force a fresh Open Food Facts fetch even if cached locally

logged_at.description: optional RFC 3339 eating time; defaults to now, never in the future

from.description: required when scope is range: inclusive start YYYY-MM-DD

to.description: required when scope is range: inclusive end YYYY-MM-DD

week.description: required when scope is week: the week ordinal

id.description: the id of the hydration entry to update

quantity_ml.description: new volume in millilitres; must be greater than zero if supplied

workout_id.description: new workout link: "<uuid>" sets, "" clears, omit to leave unchanged

meal_id.description: the id of the meal entry to update

meal_type.description: new meal type: breakfast | lunch | dinner | snack

quantity_g.description: new amount in grams; must be greater than zero if supplied

workout_id.description: new workout link: "<uuid>" sets, "" clears, omit to leave unchanged

duration_overrides.description: optional replacement duration-override list (replaces wholesale; empty list clears all duration overrides)

duration.description: bounded duration, same shape as a workout-template step duration (e.g. {"kind":"time","seconds":3600} for 60min or {"kind":"distance","meters":10000}); open/lap_button are rejected

multisport_template_id.description: optional new multisport-template UUID; switches the slot to multisport (clears any single-sport reference and rejects overrides). Set EXACTLY ONE of template_id or multisport_template_id

target_overrides.description: optional replacement override list (replaces wholesale; empty list clears all overrides)

target.description: effort target, same shape as a workout-template step target (e.g. {"kind":"pace","low_sec_per_km":435,"high_sec_per_km":435} for 7:15/km; for swim use {"kind":"swim_pace","low_sec_per_100m":92,"high_sec_per_100m":96}; for a bike/run cadence drill use {"kind":"cadence","low":88,"high":92})

template_id.description: optional new single-sport template UUID; switches the slot to single-sport (clears any multisport reference). Set EXACTLY ONE of template_id or multisport_template_id

time_of_day.description: optional new local start time HH:MM or HH:MM:SS

methodology.description: optional curated Markdown plan-level methodology (Key Principles, cross-cutting reference) the coach reads via get_training_plan

start_date.description: optional new start date YYYY-MM-DD (moves all materialized dates on re-materialize)

id.description: the id of the body-weight entry to update

weight_kg.description: new weight in kg; must be greater than zero if supplied

avg_power_w.description: corrected average power in WATTS (positive integer). Omit to leave unchanged.

clear_avg_power_w.description: set true to clear avg_power_w to null.

clear_distance_m.description: set true to clear distance_m to null.

clear_gi_distress_score.description: set true to clear gi_distress_score to null. Mutually exclusive with gi_distress_score.

clear_rpe.description: set true to clear rpe to null (retract a previously logged value). Mutually exclusive with rpe.

clear_session_group.description: set true to un-group this leg (clear session_group to null).

clear_sweat_loss_ml.description: set true to clear sweat_loss_ml to null.

clear_temperature_c.description: set true to clear temperature_c to null.

distance_m.description: corrected distance in METRES (> 0). Omit to leave unchanged.

gi_distress_score.description: GI distress severity 1..5. Per session. Omit to leave unchanged.

rpe.description: Borg CR-10 perceived effort 1..10. Per session, set after the workout. Omit to leave unchanged.

session_group.description: set the brick/multisport group key. Omit to leave unchanged.

status.description: set the lifecycle status: 'planned' or 'completed'. Typical use: promote a planned session to completed once it happens. Omit to leave unchanged.

sweat_loss_ml.description: corrected estimated sweat loss in MILLILITRES (> 0). Omit to leave unchanged.

temperature_c.description: corrected ambient temperature in °C (-40..60). Omit to leave unchanged.

id.description: the id of the workout-fuel entry to update

quantity_ml.description: new volume in millilitres; must be greater than zero

workout_id.description: new workout link: "<uuid>" sets, "" clears, omit to leave unchanged

estimated_duration_sec.description: optional new advisory duration in seconds

steps.description: optional: when supplied, replaces the whole step program

count.description: for a repeat group: number of iterations, at least 2

duration.description: for a single step: the end condition

kind.description: end condition: one of time, distance, lap_button, open

meters.description: required for distance durations; greater than 0

seconds.description: required for time durations; greater than 0

intent.description: for a single step: one of warmup, active, interval, recovery, rest, cooldown

note.description: for a single step: optional free-text cue

secondary_target.description: for a single step: optional second simultaneous target, bike templates only; must be a different metric family than target (e.g. primary power_zone + secondary hr_zone or cadence)

high.description: upper bound; must be at least the lower bound

high_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace upper bound, seconds per 100m (swim only)

high_sec_per_km.description: pace upper bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

kind.description: one of none, hr_zone, power_zone, pace, swim_pace, hr_bpm, power_w, cadence, rpe

low.description: lower bound (zones are 1 to 5; hr_bpm, power_w, rpe in their own units; cadence in rpm on bike / spm on run, bike or run only)

low_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace lower bound, seconds per 100m (swim only; e.g. 95 for 1:35/100m)

low_sec_per_km.description: pace lower bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

steps.description: for a repeat group: single steps to repeat (no nested repeats)

kind.description: end condition: one of time, distance, lap_button, open

meters.description: required for distance durations; greater than 0

seconds.description: required for time durations; greater than 0

intent.description: one of warmup, active, interval, recovery, rest, cooldown

secondary_target.description: optional second simultaneous target, bike templates only; must be a different metric family than target (e.g. primary power_zone + secondary hr_zone or cadence)

high.description: upper bound; must be at least the lower bound

high_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace upper bound, seconds per 100m (swim only)

high_sec_per_km.description: pace upper bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

kind.description: one of none, hr_zone, power_zone, pace, swim_pace, hr_bpm, power_w, cadence, rpe

low.description: lower bound (zones are 1 to 5; hr_bpm, power_w, rpe in their own units; cadence in rpm on bike / spm on run, bike or run only)

low_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace lower bound, seconds per 100m (swim only; e.g. 95 for 1:35/100m)

low_sec_per_km.description: pace lower bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

target.description: the step's effort target; use kind none for untargeted

high.description: upper bound; must be at least the lower bound

high_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace upper bound, seconds per 100m (swim only)

high_sec_per_km.description: pace upper bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

kind.description: one of none, hr_zone, power_zone, pace, swim_pace, hr_bpm, power_w, cadence, rpe

low.description: lower bound (zones are 1 to 5; hr_bpm, power_w, rpe in their own units; cadence in rpm on bike / spm on run, bike or run only)

low_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace lower bound, seconds per 100m (swim only; e.g. 95 for 1:35/100m)

low_sec_per_km.description: pace lower bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

type.description: always the literal step inside a repeat group

target.description: for a single step: the effort target

high.description: upper bound; must be at least the lower bound

high_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace upper bound, seconds per 100m (swim only)

high_sec_per_km.description: pace upper bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

kind.description: one of none, hr_zone, power_zone, pace, swim_pace, hr_bpm, power_w, cadence, rpe

low.description: lower bound (zones are 1 to 5; hr_bpm, power_w, rpe in their own units; cadence in rpm on bike / spm on run, bike or run only)

low_sec_per_100m.description: swim_pace lower bound, seconds per 100m (swim only; e.g. 95 for 1:35/100m)

low_sec_per_km.description: pace lower bound, seconds per km (run/bike only)

type.description: step for a single executable step, repeat for a repeat group

pr_type.description: optional filter to a single PR type (e.g. 5k, 10k, longest-ride)

apply.description: when true, also writes the carb_g goal bounds (min-only) for each schedule day into per-date goal overrides — preserving any existing kcal/protein/other bounds on those dates. Default false (pure compute, no side effects).

carbs_per_kg_per_day.description: load-day multiplier, 1..20 g/kg (default 10, mid-range of the documented 8-12 g/kg; lower for athletes with GI sensitivity)

days_before.description: carb-load days before race day, 0..7 (default 3). Sprint tri / short races: 1-2. 70.3: 3. Ironman: 3-4.

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; used only when apply=true (the read-only path ignores it)

race_date.description: race date in YYYY-MM-DD (must be today or later in the user's timezone)

sweat_rate_ml_per_hr.description: optional measured sweat rate in ml/hr; personalises fluid and sodium (else a flagged 600 ml/hr default is used)

to.description: inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD; up to 400 days from 'from'

tz.description: IANA timezone for calendar-day boundaries (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

sport.description: bike (→ power) | run | swim (→ speed/pace); defaults to bike

to.description: inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD; up to 400 days from 'from'

tz.description: IANA timezone for calendar-day boundaries (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

body_weight_kg.description: explicit body weight in kg; > 0. Wins over stored body-weight entries. Omit to use the rolling 7-day stored average (or the most-recent stored entry if none in the window).

tz.description: IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

group_by.description: optional: meal_type. When set, each day returns by_meal_type totals instead of a single totals object; adherence is omitted.

to.description: inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD; max 92 days from 'from'

tz.description: IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

body_weight_kg.description: explicit body-weight override (kg); > 0. Otherwise the resolver picks from stored body-weight entries.

duration_min.description: duration in minutes; > 0. Required in explicit mode.

intensity_zone.description: intensity zone 1–5. Required in explicit mode.

workout_id.description: workout UUID. Pulls sport/duration/intensity from the row. Mutually exclusive with sport/duration_min/intensity_zone.

product_id.description: id of the recipe product to recompute

date.description: YYYY-MM-DD; REQUIRED when kind=recommendation, omit for standing items

expires_at.description: YYYY-MM-DD; hard cutoff after which the item drops out of grounding

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args

kind.description: one of: fact, preference, constraint, observation, recommendation

review_at.description: YYYY-MM-DD; soft review date — past it, the item is flagged needs_review

scope.description: optional tag: fueling, training, recovery, race, general

text.description: the memory text; stored verbatim, required, non-empty

anchor_date.description: calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD (the trailing window ends here, inclusive)

tz.description: IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

window_days.description: window size in calendar days; range [2, 30]. Typical values: 3 (acute), 7 (weekly trend), 14 (training-block trend), 30 (block-length trend).

date.description: the calendar day YYYY-MM-DD to schedule it on

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; derived when omitted

multisport_template_id.description: the multisport template UUID to compile and schedule

q.description: substring to match against product name and brand; case-insensitive

calcium_mg.description: calcium mg per day for this date

carbs_g.description: carb grams per day (min/max) for this date

date.description: calendar date for the override in YYYY-MM-DD

fat_g.description: fat grams per day (min/max) for this date

fiber_g.description: fiber grams per day for this date

iron_mg.description: iron mg per day for this date

kcal.description: daily kilocalorie target as a range {min, max} for this date

magnesium_mg.description: magnesium mg per day for this date

potassium_mg.description: potassium mg per day for this date

protein_g.description: protein grams per day (min/max) for this date

salt_g.description: salt grams per day for this date

sugar_g.description: sugar grams per day for this date

vitamin_b12_mcg.description: vitamin B12 mcg per day for this date

vitamin_c_mg.description: vitamin C mg per day for this date

vitamin_d_mcg.description: vitamin D mcg per day for this date

zinc_mg.description: zinc mg per day for this date

calcium_mg.description: calcium mg per day. Typically min-only.

fiber_g.description: fiber grams per day. Typically min-only ({min: 30}) but max also accepted.

iron_mg.description: iron mg per day. Typically min-only.

kcal.description: daily kilocalorie target as a range {min, max}. For 'I want N kcal a day' the agent should pick a tolerance — e.g. {min: N*0.95, max: N*1.05} — unless the user states one explicitly.

magnesium_mg.description: magnesium mg per day. Typically min-only.

potassium_mg.description: potassium mg per day. Typically min-only.

salt_g.description: salt grams per day. Typically max-only.

sugar_g.description: sugar grams per day. Typically max-only ({max: 50}).

vitamin_b12_mcg.description: vitamin B12 mcg per day. Typically min-only.

vitamin_c_mg.description: vitamin C mg per day. Typically min-only.

vitamin_d_mcg.description: vitamin D mcg per day. Typically min-only.

zinc_mg.description: zinc mg per day. Typically min-only.

to.description: inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD; up to 400 days from 'from'

tz.description: IANA timezone for calendar-day boundaries (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

id.description: the fulfilled workout id to revert back to planned

idempotency_key.description: optional retry key; if omitted, a stable key is derived from the other args

id.description: the id of the memory item to update

review_at.description: new YYYY-MM-DD review date (e.g. to confirm a fact is still true)

methodology.description: replaces wholesale when supplied, leaves unchanged when omitted

race_id.description: empty string clears the race anchor, UUID string sets it, missing leaves unchanged

default_template_id.description: empty string clears, UUID string sets, missing leaves unchanged

macrocycle_id.description: empty string clears the season link, UUID string sets it, missing leaves unchanged

macrocycle_ordinal.description: position of this phase in the season's progression (1-based)

methodology.description: optional curated Markdown 'why this phase' prose the coach reads; replaces wholesale when supplied, leaves unchanged when omitted

target_weekly_hours.description: per-period planning target for weekly training hours

target_weekly_tss.description: per-period planning target for weekly TSS

type.description: one of: base, build, peak, recovery, race_week, off_season, other

status.description: planned or skipped (eaten is set only via mark_planned_meal_eaten and is terminal)

legs.description: if present, REPLACES all legs (empty array clears them); omit to leave unchanged

expected_duration_min.description: optional expected duration in minutes; > 0. Drives the fuelling plan — legs without it get no fuelling.

intensity.description: optional free annotation (easy|moderate|hard|race or a zone)

ordinal.description: 1-based order of this leg within the race; unique per race

checked.description: true to mark bought (stamps checked_at), false to un-check

body_fat_pct.description: explicit body-fat percentage override; 0 <= x < 100. Used with the stored body weight to derive FFM.

from.description: inclusive RFC 3339 lower bound for the window

lean_mass_kg.description: explicit fat-free mass override in kg (highest-trust input); > 0. Wins over body_fat_pct and any stored composition data.

to.description: exclusive RFC 3339 upper bound; max 92 days from 'from'

tz.description: IANA timezone for calendar-day boundaries (e.g. Europe/Berlin). If omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ.

to.description: inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD; max 366 days from 'from'

tz.description: IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Berlin); if omitted, the REST server uses DEFAULT_USER_TZ

plan_id.description: optional: restrict to workouts whose plan slot belongs to this training-plan id (off-plan completed work is excluded)

to.description: inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD (local); max 92-day span

tz.description: optional IANA timezone for the date window and the now-comparison (defaults to the configured user timezone)

workout_id.description: the workout id to summarise fueling for
